title: Landmark Group India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Landmark Group India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
